content:
🟢 TradeWar | 7/10
🇪🇨 🇨🇴

Colombia-Ecuador trade collapses amid tariff war
Trade relations between Colombia and Ecuador are rapidly collapsing amid an escalating tariff dispute. Ecuador has imposed a 100% tariff on all imports from Colombia. In response, Colombia has introduced restrictions on Ecuadorian goods, with rates reaching up to 75%. This mutual escalation is leading to a sharp decline in bilateral trade volumes. Businesses in both countries are already feeling the economic impact of this confrontation.

#OSINT #NewsGroup #Ecuador #Colombia #TradeWar #Economy

content:
We don't actually know if ninjas were a real thing.

First, most of what you “know” about ninjas was completely made up by TV shows and movies.

Second, we have the problem of Japan being both highly literate AND isolated, so we cannot cross-check against other historical records to make sure someone wasn’t lying or changing the historical record. For all we know, “ninjas” were just a cover story for samurai who broke the samurai code in the name of the usual statecraft shenanigans.

For different reasons, we do not know if shield maidens were really a thing either. I assure you that is just as disappointing to Scandinavians as telling Japanese people that ninjas may not have been real.

On a related note, why hasn't anyone made a ninjas vs shield maidens movie? C’mon, possibly mythical assassins vs possibly mythical bodyguards? The script practically writes itself.

PS—Hatchets were Viking shuriken.

card.title: Direct electrochemical appraisal of black coffee quality using cyclic voltammetry - Nature Communications
card.description: Coffee flavor is primarily determined by the bean roast color and concentration of the beverage. Here, the authors show that both of these characteristics are reflected in the coffee’s cyclic voltammogram. This approach enables rapid determination of the strength and roast intensity of the coffee.

content:
🟢 Statement | 8/10
🇺🇸 🇨🇺

Trump says US would take over Cuba if it invades
US President Donald Trump has made a striking statement regarding a potential invasion scenario involving Cuba. According to him, in the event of aggression against the island nation, the United States would immediately take control of it. The politician also mentioned an architect with a 'beautiful Hispanic flair' who allegedly worked on the corresponding plan. This statement comes amid escalating geopolitical tensions in the Caribbean basin. Experts note that such rhetoric may indicate a hardening of Washington's stance toward Havana.

#OSINT #NewsGroup #US #Cuba #Statement #Geopolitics

media_attachments.description: A satirical news graphic from The Chaser by John Delmenico. The top half shows a photo of Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese looking serious, wearing a dark suit, glasses, and an earpiece, with the Australian flag partially visible behind his shoulder. The Chaser's logo (a spilling glass in a red circle) sits on the right. The bottom half features a large, italicized headline that reads: "PM urges voters to be 'realistic' with demands, “increasing tax on our party donors isn’t feasible”".

content:
I have a small rock garden in front of my house and I’m going to turn it into a “Kindness Garden”. My goal is to paint rocks with kind, hopeful, inclusive messages and pictures. A lot of kids live on my street and I’m hoping they might like the messages, or even want to take a rock with them.

What are some pictures or messages you might like to see in a kindness rock garden?

(I’ll include some of my ideas so far in the comments, I’d love to hear more ideas/suggestions!)

#KindnessRox #Kindness

content: We went to our little neighborhood café for dinner. It was lovely sitting on the covered patio, listening to the rain fall, and stuffing a burger in my face. There was a small group of college boys at the table near us. All of a sudden, two of the guys jumped up and ran out into the rain to an elderly lady who was slowly making her way up an incline from the street. One offered her his arm to hold onto, while the other took her umbrella and held it over her head. My little grinch heart grew about three sizes. The kids are alright.
